infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Nirbhaya uses Face ID for secure and quick login to protect your account.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone for speech-to-text transcription.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera for AR navigation and image analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location for safety features and route guidance.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs background location access for geofencing and safety monitoring.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs location access for safety features, route monitoring, and geofencing alerts.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your microphone for speech-to-text.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: This app needs location access for safety features, route monitoring, and geofencing alerts.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: This app needs background location access for geofencing and safety monitoring.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: This app needs access to your location for safety features and route guidance.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera for AR navigation and escape guidance.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use Face ID for secure authentication.
